description_long: This is a small, round, yellow cup with a wide opening and a single, angular handle attached to one side. The front of the cup features a playful smiley face with large black eyes, a wide black mouth, and a red bow tie with white polka dots beneath the mouth, giving it a cheerful and whimsical appearance. The cup's surface is matte and smooth, with no visible gloss or shine. The handle is thick and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior of the cup is plain and matches the exterior yellow color. There are no visible logos, text, or branding, and the cup does not have a lid.
description: A cheerful yellow cup with a smiley face, red polka-dot bow tie, and a single angular handle. The surface is matte and smooth, with no lid or branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the smiley face, red bow tie, and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered and only part of the smiley face visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain yellow back and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Back view with no facial features visible, only a hint of the smiley face at the edge and the handle barely visible at the top.
